title: sonchus pruinatus
intro: Sonchus pruinatus, also known as the woolly sowthistle or woolly leaf sowthistle, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Sonchus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve pain. The health benefits of Sonchus pruinatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential allergic reactions and interactions with certain medications.
